dates.summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0, including the Dola-Seed-2.0-Preview model and a new Seed Full-Duplex Speech LLM focused on attentive listening, interference suppression, and more natural voice interaction. A separate strategic signal came from reports that Anthropic and SpaceX are working together on compute, pointing to continued pressure on frontier-model infrastructure supply. Most other surfaced items were early-stage GitHub tooling without enough evidence of enterprise or research impact.
